I’m writing the required DDx evidence file so this attempt closes with a precise blocker instead of a silent no-op.

Blocked on the dependency upgrade, so I did not change the code.

What I verified:
- `cli/cmd` route-status tests pass.
- `cli/internal/agent` session-log tests pass.
- The repo-wide search only finds the `ModelRoute*` references in `cli/internal/agent/serviceconfig.go`; the other hits are historical docs/tracker data.
- `go list -m -versions github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/fizeau` stops at `v0.10.7`, and that release still defines the `ServiceConfig` `ModelRoute*` methods, so removing the stubs would not compile without a newer upstream release.
